'''ngarono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xmas|xmas]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xmas|xmas]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngarono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæreneth|ngæreneth]] || [[word:ngærenej|ngærenej]] || [[word:ngærenesh|ngærenesh]] || [[word:ngærene|ngærene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngaroronoth|ngaroronoth]] || [[word:ngaroronoj|ngaroronoj]] || [[word:ngaroronosh|ngaroronosh]] || [[word:ngarorono|ngarorono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngaronoth|ngaronoth]] || [[word:ngaronoj|ngaronoj]] || [[word:ngaronosh|ngaronosh]] || [[word:ngarono|ngarono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngarofnoth|ngarofnoth]] || [[word:ngarofnoj|ngarofnoj]] || [[word:ngarofnosh|ngarofnosh]] || [[word:ngarofnof|ngarofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngaronotho|ngaronotho]] || [[word:ngaronojo|ngaronojo]] || [[word:ngaronosho|ngaronosho]] || [[word:ngaronoko|ngaronoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngaronoth|ngaronoth]] || [[word:ngaronoj|ngaronoj]] || [[word:ngaronosh|ngaronosh]] || [[word:ngarono|ngarono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngaronothol|ngaronothol]] || [[word:ngaronojol|ngaronojol]] || [[word:ngaronoshol|ngaronoshol]] || [[word:ngaronokol|ngaronokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngaronothotho|ngaronothotho]] || [[word:ngaronojojo|ngaronojojo]] || [[word:ngaronoshosho|ngaronoshosho]] || [[word:ngaronoko|ngaronoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngaronothon|ngaronothon]] || [[word:ngaronojon|ngaronojon]] || [[word:ngaronoshon|ngaronoshon]] || [[word:ngaronokon|ngaronokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngaronothoro|ngaronothoro]] || [[word:ngaronojoro|ngaronojoro]] || [[word:ngaronoshoro|ngaronoshoro]] || [[word:ngaronokoro|ngaronokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
